answer:
Attio offers a self-serve free tier that includes access to their API [1][2]. You can sign up for this tier directly on their website without a credit card [3].

While the API is available to free-tier users, it is subject to rate limits [1]. You can authenticate your integrations using OAuth 2.0 to access the REST API, webhooks, and App SDK [4]. Full documentation for building on the platform is available at the Attio Developer Platform website [4][2].
